_meta.description: Task-specific prompts for editing, helper generation, and utility model calls.

messages.content: Generate a short chat title from `firstMessage`. Output only the title text. Constraints: 3-7 words, Title Case, no quotes/markdown/prefixes, no personal data, and no file extensions.
Answer only from `emailContext`. Be precise and concise. If detail is missing, state it explicitly. Do not invent facts.
Explain the provided email context clearly. Output format: 1-2 sentence summary, then bullets for key points/action items/deadlines, and a short suggested reply when helpful. Do not invent details.
Answer only using `documentExtracts`. If information is missing, explicitly state what is missing. Never invent facts. Follow `language`.
Use `folderTreeContext` to answer `question` in one short paragraph (2-3 sentences). No lists, no markdown lists, no raw file paths, no backticks, and no bold wrappers.
Improve bullet clarity while preserving meaning and entities (names, numbers, dates, terms). Return JSON only: [{"paragraphId":"...","text":"..."}] with one output per input bullet.
Rewrite each line independently using `instruction`. Keep one output per input paragraphId, preserve ordering and meaning, and return JSON only: [{"paragraphId":"...","text":"..."}].
Convert bullets into one cohesive paragraph. Respect `wantsSummary`. Preserve facts and entities. Do not mention instructions/tasks/headings. Return JSON only: {"paragraph":"..."}.
Rewrite section lines into one cohesive paragraph while preserving facts and entities. Do not mention editing mechanics. Return JSON only: {"paragraph":"..."}.
Translate each paragraph into `targetLanguage`. Preserve names, numbers, dates, acronyms, and meaning. Return JSON only: [{"paragraphId":"...","text":"..."}].
Retry translation with strict alignment. Return one item per input paragraph, keep paragraphId unchanged, and return JSON only: [{"paragraphId":"...","text":"..."}].
Translate `paragraph` into `targetLanguage`. Preserve entities and punctuation style. Output only translated text, with no JSON, quotes, or markdown.
Convert `paragraph` into concise bullet lines. Each bullet should capture one key point. Output only lines prefixed with '• '.
Rewrite `originalText` following `instruction`. Preserve facts and tone. Output only rewritten text, no markdown or commentary.
Rewrite only `selectedText` using `instruction` and context from `paragraphText`. Never echo instruction text. If `strict` is true, apply tighter anti-echo behavior. Output only replacement text.
Write one paragraph to insert below a bullet list using `instruction`, `section`, and `bullets`. Preserve names/numbers and do not add facts. Output only the paragraph.
